titles.title: I Don't Want to Get Adjusted

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In this world, we have our troubles Sometimes lonesome, sometimes blue But the hope of life eternal Makes all old hopes brand-new

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I don't want to get adjusted (I don't want to get adjusted) To this world (to this world), to this world (to this world) I've got a home so much better And I'm gonna go there sooner or later I don't wanna get adjusted to this world (to this world)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord, I'm growing old and weary There's no place that feels like home Jesus come my soul to carry Oh-oh, where I never more shall roam.
